zh.lifeSummary: Galfridus Thorkelsson Crawford是Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson和Eadgyth Of Wessex的兒子，出生。他於大約1076年與Sweynsdatter在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Galfridus Thorkelsson Crawford是Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson和Eadgyth Of Wessex的儿子，出生。他于大约1076年与Sweynsdatter在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Thorkelsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian Thorkelsen or of its more common variant Torkelsen (see Torkelson ).
Americanized form of Swedish Thorkelsson, a very rare variant of Torkelsson (see Torkelson ), a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Torkelson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Hjalmer, Selmer.

Americanized form of Norwegian Torkelsen or its rare variant Torkellsen: patronymic from the personal name Torkel(l), a form of Old Norse Thorketill, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + ketill ‘sacrificial cauldron, helmet’. Compare Thorkelson .
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Torkelsson, rare Swedish cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

en.lifeSummary: Galfridus Thorkelsson Crawford was born as the son of Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson and Eadgyth Of Wessex. He married Sweynsdatter about 1076, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Galfridus Thorkelsson Crawford est né, fils de Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson et Eadgyth Of Wessex. Il a épousé Sweynsdatter environ 1076, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Galfridus Thorkelsson Crawford wurde, als Sohn von Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson und Eadgyth Of Wessex geboren. Er hat um 1076 in Europa Sweynsdatter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Galfridus Thorkelsson Crawford è nato il come figlio di Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson e Eadgyth Of Wessex. Lui sposato Sweynsdatter circa 1076, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Galfridus Thorkelsson CrawfordはThorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut HaraldssonとEadgyth Of Wessexの息子として生まれた。約1076年にヨーロッパでSweynsdatterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Galfridus Thorkelsson Crawford(은)는 Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson(와)과 Eadgyth Of Wessex의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1076년 우럽에서 Sweynsdatter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Galfridus Thorkelsson Crawford nasceu filho de Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson e Eadgyth Of Wessex. Ele casou-se com Sweynsdatter aproximadamente 1076, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Galfridus Thorkelsson Crawford родился. Его родителей звали Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson и Eadgyth Of Wessex. Он женился на женщине по имени Sweynsdatter около 1076 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Galfridus Thorkelsson Crawford nació como hijo de Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson y Eadgyth Of Wessex. Se casó con Sweynsdatter aproximadamente 1076, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
